appraisal_events.evidence: « doté … de lunettes … vissées à ses yeux »; « j’aperçus … minuscule, pâle, convulsif, expirant, un regard lointain »; sa saillie « près du grand Cherbourg … du petit Dunkerque » m’ennuya et je n’osai pas demander d’explications.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator belittles Brichot through a cruel description of his physical decline and by presenting a pedantic and opaque witticism, signaling dependence (he takes his arm) and rhetorical weakness.

status_effects.explanation: The description emphasizes his decrepitude and a heavy spirit, making him appear diminished in the eyes of the narrator.
